overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving from an industrial district with shipping containers and smokestacks, through elevated highway interchanges with futuristic billboards, into a desert highway cutting through rocky canyon terrain. The sequence captures the transition from urban industrial to arid wasteland environments under a bright clear sky.

events.description: vehicle turns left at intersection from industrial yard onto main road
exiting enclosed industrial area into open intersection with billboards

agents.ego_description: navigating out of industrial yard and turning onto main arterial road

large concrete highway overpass with multiple levels
industrial yellow steel crane framework with green accents

segments.scene_description: The vehicle starts in an industrial container yard beneath highway overpasses, then turns left onto a main road. Yellow crane structures and stacked shipping containers dominate the left side while the camera moves toward an open intersection with futuristic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with factories and smokestacks

events.description: black smoke becomes visible rising from industrial smokestacks on the left
approaching highway on-ramp, leaving ground level industrial streets

notable_agents.action: walking along sidewalk near traffic light

blue industrial factory structures with metal frameworks
overhead highway direction signs with white arrows

segments.scene_description: Driving along an industrial street with factories and smokestacks visible on the left emitting black smoke. The vehicle passes through moderate traffic and approaches a highway on-ramp, transitioning from ground-level streets to the elevated highway system.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway interchange with panoramic views

events.description: vehicle accelerates up highway ramp gaining elevation
reaching high elevation revealing desert valley and industrial ruins below

agents.ego_description: ascending highway ramp and merging onto elevated highway with increasing speed

vertical billboard with 'nicola' branding and circular logo
expansive view of arid desert landscape with industrial ruins
multi-level concrete highway interchange with sweeping curves

segments.scene_description: The vehicle climbs an elevated highway ramp, revealing expansive desert views. Futuristic billboards including one advertising 'WET DREAM' line the right side as the camera reaches high elevation overlooking the industrial valley below.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway passing through industrial ruins and rocky terrain

events.description: passing under large concrete overpass structure temporarily blocking sky view
entering rocky canyon section with red rock formations on right

agents.ego_description: cruising on elevated highway passing billboards and industrial structures

entered.detail: rusted collapsed highway or pipeline structure with wooden supports
abandoned industrial buildings and debris in the valley below
arid hills with sparse vegetation and red rock outcroppings

segments.scene_description: Driving on the elevated highway through the desert, passing under overpasses and alongside collapsed industrial structures. The landscape transitions to reveal rocky desert terrain with red rock formations while the highway curves through the arid environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane desert highway cutting through rocky canyon

events.description: passing under series of highway overpasses while maintaining speed
approaching hillside settlement with dense buildings on right

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on desert highway alongside rocky cliffs

entered.detail: large red rock canyon wall rising immediately beside the highway
concrete bridge structure crossing over the highway
dense cluster of buildings built into the rocky hillside

segments.scene_description: The final stretch shows the vehicle speeding along a multi-lane desert highway carved through rocky canyon terrain. Large red rock cliffs rise on the right while overhead overpasses cross the road. A hillside settlement becomes visible in the distance as the highway continues toward the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle travels from a dense industrial hub into a vast, arid desert canyon. It begins in a container yard beneath highway overpasses, moving past yellow cranes and stacked shipping containers before turning toward an intersection filled with futuristic billboards. As the vehicle navigates industrial streets lined with smoke-emitting factories, the camera transitions from ground-level traffic onto an ascending highway ramp that reveals an expansive valley below. The scene then shifts to an elevated highway where the urban sprawl gives way to rocky desert terrain and collapsed structures, passing under overpasses and alongside billboards. Finally, the road carves through a landscape of towering red rock cliffs and deep canyons, speeding toward a distant hillside settlement under a clear sky.
